sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check all objects and their positions
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
    cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
    print(f"Color={n['color']:>2s} | pixels={n['pixels']:>4d} | rows={min(rows):2d}-{max(rows):2d} | cols={min(cols):2d}-{max(cols):2d} | hash={n['hash'][:12]}")

# Check what changed after RIGHT
if last_transition:
    before = last_transition.before_frame
    after = last_transition.after_frame
    
    # Find N and W objects in before vs after
    for label, frame in [('before', before), ('after', after)]:
        for n in frame.segmentation['nodes']:
            if n['color'] in ('N', 'W'):
                rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
                cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
                print(f"  {label} {n['color']}: rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
